race.comment: Open race. PROVEN SOUL (9) is knocking on the door of a second career win, placing in her past three outings. She was beaten a nose two back before a good effort up to this grade last time out. She'll roll forward and take catching again. AUDIO POP CAM (1) has won both starts this time in, both at Ballarat Synthetic. She has to convert that form to turf here with a tough draw and a big weight but has to be respected again. TSARINE (10) ran a brave race first up at Moe when up on speed, going down by a long neck. She should be fitter for that and draws for every hope. HAPPY TIERS (4) ran well fresh at Sale when dashing nicely off a slow speed to grab fourth. Tricky draw but should be hard to hold out.
